records.ety: [OF. lachesse, fr. lache lax, indolent, F. lche, ultimately fr. L. laxus loose, lax. See Lax.]

defs: Neglect; negligence; remissness; neglect to do a thing at the proper time; especially, a delay in asserting a claim, sufficient to cause a person to lose the right to adjuducation of the claim by a court.
quotes: It ill became him to take advantage of such a laches with the eagerness of a shrewd attorney.
